name: notion-get-users
title: Get users and bots in workspace

query.description: Optional search query to filter users by name or email (case-insensitive).

start_cursor.description: Cursor for pagination. Use the next_cursor value from the previous response to get the next page.

page_size.description: Number of users to return per page (default: 100, max: 100).

user_id.description: Return only the user matching this ID. Pass "self" to fetch the current user.
